docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED JUN-02-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VOKLLRATH, KARIN
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (506)

TRIAL RESET TO JUN-30-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-29-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NEW HEARING. PER SC-105 ORDER (SEPT-02-2011) GRANTING REQUEST TO VACATE DISMISSAL(JUN-30-2011). ADDENDUM TO SEPTEMBER 2 2011 SC105 ORDER ATTACHED. HEARING SET FOR FEB-03-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE OF THE DEFENDANT. REQUEST FOR A RESET. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAM, CARINA
ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER IS "GRANTED". PLAINTIFF IS TO PAY DEFENDANT $478.40 AS A PENALTY PURSUANT TO CCP 473(A)(1)(A). - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, CARINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VOKLLRATH, KARIN PURSUANT TO CCP 473 (C)(1)(A) A PENALTY OF $478.40 IS IMPOSED ON THE PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

TRIAL RESET TO APR-29-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-18-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
(SC-105) "ANSWER" FROM THE DEFENDANT KARIN VOKLLRATH, RECEIVED AND FILED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPERANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED BY WINNIE YU--CANTONESE INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TAM, CARINA AS TO DEFENDANT VOKLLRATH, KARIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
